text:
In the first scene, I feel a sense of anticipation and slight detachment, looking into the glass-walled meeting room, the vacant chairs seeming to invite potential – a gathering of minds yet to happen. The quiet, modern space seems to hum silently with possibility, but presently it's marked by absence.

In the second scene, awash in vibrant colors and the bold declaration of 'R + D,' I feel intellectually stimulated and curious. The words on the wall and the interactive displays promise knowledge and innovation, making me aware of the ever-present drive in humanity to explore, understand, and create. I feel more engaged here, caught up in the energy of research and discovery.
